trivia_bullets.text: Released September 27, 2024 in Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK). The Harrowing refers to lore-specific surges of Valgavoth's power following his molting cycle — periods when his demonic energy peaks, new horrors are born, and cultists believe they must suffer to join him.
sources: WebSearch: Valgavoth lore MTG Wiki via search snippet

trivia_bullets.text: "Valgavoth wants our pain, our terror! We cannot join him unless we suffer!" The speaker is an unnamed fanatic — Human Cleric per type line — whose cult doctrine names Valgavoth directly. The oracle text mechanically enacts this: symmetric discard (suffering) offset by draw for the fanatic (communion).

Typed Creature — Human Cleric. The ETB loot effect (symmetric discard; draw if you discarded) gives black a rare form of card-neutral looting on a body. Art by Fajareka Setiawan, Indonesian freelance illustrator with 121+ MTG credits spanning Innistrad: Midnight Hunt, Duskmourn, and many other recent sets.

EDHREC rank 14,240 — modest Commander uptake. Symmetric discard is a liability in multiplayer but the self-replacing draw clause offsets card cost; sees play in reanimator and looting-matters Commander builds where filling the graveyard is the goal.

related_cards.note: The demon explicitly named in the flavor text; object of the fanatic's worship
